description: A reference infrastructure note referencing contracted cash flows from a utility-scale solar farm. Disclosures emphasize power-purchase agreement tenor, operating availability, and reserve assumptions.

docs.label: Project note summary
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Summarizes project capacity, note tenor, and payment waterfall.

docs.label: PPA overview
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Describes illustrative offtaker and contracted revenue assumptions.

docs.label: Operations report
docs.note: Illustrative material, not a legal instrument. Provides reference availability and maintenance assumptions.
